name: pkcs-mvp-m1-m2
title: PKCS MVP: M1+M2 agent access and basic retrieval
description: Implement the first PKCS MVP by combining M1 and M2: MCP-first access, local HTTP support, raw archive, PostgreSQL metadata, AI conversation and Markdown/Web ingest, full-text search, read_source, and Context Pack v0.
creator: tantless
notes: M1+M2 MVP is complete locally through PR7 and post-MVP database modeling cleanup. Core loop is implemented: ingest, Raw Archive, PostgreSQL chunks/citations, FTS search, read_source, Context Pack, CLI, HTTP health, and MCP tools. Real Codex CLI MCP acceptance is documented as the next manual validation step.

next_discussion: Run real Codex CLI MCP acceptance against PKCS.
Decide M3 scope: retrieval orchestration, semantic retrieval, reranking, and Context Pack selection improvements.
Decide future knowledge types and additional ingest sources.
